## Documentation

## i18n Checklist (only if `frontend/locales/**` modified)
- [ ] `pnpm run check:i18n` passes (en-US <-> zh-CN key parity)
- [ ] `pnpm test:i18n` passes (15/15)
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes (no MISSING_MESSAGE)
- [ ] New English terms added to `docs/i18n/glossary.md` with status `approved`
- [ ] zh-CN translation reviewed by a Chinese native speaker
- [ ] No hardcoded English UI text introduced in components
- [ ] Brand/proper nouns kept in English (Whisper / Parakeet / Ollama / OpenRouter / Claude / Groq / BlackHole)

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style
- [ ] Self-reviewed the code
- [ ] Added comments for complex code
- [ ] Updated README if needed
- [ ] Branch is up to date with devtest
- [ ] No merge conflicts
